Jiangsu Geshi Intelligent Security Co., Ltd. highlights a profound industrial relocation and technological pivot. Despite possessing a 10 Million RMB registered capital, its paid-in capital is 1 Million RMB, and it functions with a micro-sized team of exactly 10 insured employees (as of 2024). This structural profile indicates an asset-light system integration and R&D sales node rather than a large-scale heavy manufacturing plant. Its updated business scope aggressively incorporates advanced technologies, including intelligent unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), robotics, AI software development, and big data services, while its legacy domain name ('geshifire.com') still tethers it to its foundational fire safety roots.
